values.content:
=You are a content repurposing expert. Take the following content and create 5 different versions optimized for different platforms:

1. Twitter/X thread (max 280 chars per tweet, 5-7 tweets)
2. LinkedIn post (professional tone, 1300 chars max)
3. Instagram caption (with emoji, hashtags)
4. Email newsletter snippet (conversational)
5. Blog post outline (H2 headers with bullet points)

Original content:
{{ $json.body.content }}

Format your response as JSON with keys: twitter, linkedin, instagram, email, blog
